title: feat(core): add metadata filtering for message queries

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat(pg): add btree indexes on memory_messages metadata fields

summary: Adds metadata filtering support (filter.metadata with AND semantics) for listMessages and listMessagesByResourceId across all 11 storage backends. Includes SQL-level filtering for PG/LibSQL/D1/MSSQL/ClickHouse and in-memory post-fetch filtering for KV/Convex/DynamoDB/LanceDB/Upstash. Adds validateMetadataKeys to base MemoryStorage. Also implements the missing listMessagesByResourceId for D1 and MSSQL backends. 9 new shared tests in _test-utils cover single/multi-key filters, type handling, pagination, and date range combinations. Docs updated for recall() and message-history. Two changesets included. Peer deps bumped to >=1.11.0 across all store packages.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured cross-cutting feature by a maintainer. CI has failures in Agent Builder, Combined Store, Core, Observability, and Full Test Suite — need to check if these are pre-existing flaky tests or related to this PR (Memory Tests and E2E Tests are still pending). CodeRabbit flagged 17 actionable issues including: (1) MSSQL metadata validation errors being swallowed by try/catch instead of propagating, (2) MSSQL sort comparator ignoring requested orderBy when seq_id exists, (3) D1 count query missing Number() coercion, (4) MSSQL JSON_VALUE not guarded by ISJSON check, (5) null metadata filter conflating missing keys with explicit nulls in MSSQL. The scope is large (32 files, 11 backends) but coherent — all changes serve metadata filtering. PR #14034 (merged same day) adds btree indexes on PG metadata fields, which complements this PR's query-time filtering.
